prompt: Transform the training room into an ancient castle with knights instead of enemy targets.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the current training room environment into an ancient castle interior. Replace the modern concrete walls, exposed wooden beams, and arched windows with weathered stone walls, medieval-style windows, and a high, grand castle ceiling. Remove the modern scoreboard visible in the background. In the mid-ground and background, replace all the red-armored enemy targets with multiple knights wearing full medieval plate armor, positioned similarly as if in a formation or drill.
objects: Multiple knights wearing full medieval plate armor, positioned similarly (in mid-ground and background)
